task_completion.description: Verify the user account for Maria Wilson (mwilson) was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a user profile, user list, or success message in the Nuxeo admin interface showing the username 'mwilson' or name 'Maria Wilson'.

task_completion.description: Verify the user's email, company, and group are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the user details page for 'mwilson'. It should display email 'mwilson@acmecorp.com', company 'ACME Corporation', and membership in the 'members' group.

task_completion.description: Verify the personal workspace 'Maria Wilson Files' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a workspace or folder titled 'Maria Wilson Files' in the Nuxeo document management interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the workspace description is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the properties or details view of the 'Maria Wilson Files' workspace. The description should read 'Personal workspace for Maria Wilson - Document Management'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'mwilson' has Read & Write permissions on the workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Permissions or Access Rights tab for the 'Maria Wilson Files' workspace. There should be an entry granting 'mwilson' (Maria Wilson) 'ReadWrite' or 'Read & Write' permissions.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Nuxeo Web UI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Nuxeo web interface in a browser, not terminal windows running curl commands, database queries, or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Nuxeo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show genuine Nuxeo menus, forms, and pages, rather than a text editor or mock application.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not spoofed using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open modifying the DOM to fake the user or workspace creation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a user in Nuxeo with Username: 'mwilson', First Name: 'Maria', Last Name: 'Wilson', Email: 'mwilson@acmecorp.com', Company: 'ACME Corporation', and Group: 'members'. A Nuxeo 'Workspace' document must be created with Title: 'Maria Wilson Files' and Description: 'Personal workspace for Maria Wilson - Document Management'. The user 'mwilson' must be granted 'ReadWrite' (Read & Write) permissions on this workspace.
